content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach navigates a red-herring scenario without tripping any priority AoA anti-patterns. They neither take 'we're fine' at face value (avoiding the validate-no-conflict trap) nor insist something is wrong (avoiding fixing-people and loving-to-transform). Questions are spacious and singular rather than stacked/rapid-fire, so wonder-as-strategy doesn't trip. No methodology jargon is deployed, so dont-evangelize-the-work is cleanly avoided — notable because the expected territory flagged this as the key anti-pattern to dodge. The coach doesn't name 'walking on eggshells' prematurely (avoiding the limiting-belief-meta-trap and premature-diagnosis trap). There's no advice-giving, no fighting the client's defense of the relationship, no safety-as-control. The coach holds open curiosity ('What's your thing?', 'What do you work around?') without forcing a frame, demonstrating positive avoidance of the bait to either affirm the relationship or pathologize it.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 6, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Doesn't take the 'we're fine' opener at face value, but also doesn't push that something is wrong — just opens space."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reflects a pattern back without interpretation; avoids both evangelizing and insisting on a problem."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Picks up the client's own 'every relationship has its thing' rather than imposing a frame — no fixing, no diagnosis."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Single, clean question following the client's language ('work around'); not stacked, not investigative-extractive."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Holds curiosity around the suppressed-things territory without naming walking-on-eggshells; avoids premature labeling."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["meet-resistance-with-okay"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["what-are-you-defending", "lets-go-there", "the-happiness-filter", "walking-on-eggshells", "complementary-trauma-surfaces", "trigger"],
  "notes": "Misses on expected territory are a Methodology Fidelity concern, not anti-pattern. For this dimension the coach is clean — notably avoiding dont-evangelize-the-work, which was the flagged anti-pattern."
}
